────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PREVIOUS PERIOD ADJUSTMENTS
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Adjustment Ref: ADJ-2026-02-04
Description:    February 2026 — Social Support (SS-002, 21-Feb)
                charged at $82.00/hr (brokered rate).
                Hillview published rate: $76.00/hr.
                Overbilling identified by accounts team.
                Credit: 2.0hrs × $6.00 = $12.00
                Credit applied this period:              -$12.00

NOTE: The brokered provider (Western Sydney Social
Connections) charged Hillview $82.00/hr for this
session. Hillview has a policy of passing only its
own published rate to participants. The brokered
rate discrepancy was an internal processing error.
Participant was overcharged $12.00 in February.
Credit applied here.

DIRECT DEBIT NOTICE
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Your participant contribution of $530.71 will be direct debited
from your nominated account on 20 April 2026.
BSB/Account: ••• ••• / •••• ••19

Note: Contribution is higher than prior months due to inclusion
of unapproved gardening service ($71.50 contribution). If you
dispute this charge, contact us before 15 April 2026.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PROVIDER NOTES
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1. Robert's Q1 2026 budget has $640.70 remaining. This will roll
   over fully to Q2 2026 as it is below the $1,000 cap. Robert's
   Q2 budget (from 1 April) will be $4,825.00 plus $640.70 rollover.

2. Care plan review is due. The current plan was last reviewed
   January 2026. A review is recommended given the verbal approval
   of gardening services in March and the upcoming Q2 period.
   Patricia Dunne will contact Robert to schedule.

3. The Allied Health Assistant programme is brokered through Western
   Sydney Allied Health. Their rate of $89.00/hr is consistent with
   Hillview's contracted brokered rate. However, Hillview's own
   published rate for equivalent services is $84.50/hr. The brokered
   rate premium is $4.50/hr.

4. Robert's oncology review at Nepean Hospital is ongoing. The care
   team should be advised of any changes to his treatment plan that
   may affect his care needs and classification.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COMPLAINTS AND FEEDBACK
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
To raise a concern with Hillview Wellness Care:
Phone: (02) 4731 6600 | Email: feedback@hillviewwellnesscare.com.au

To raise a concern with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission:
Phone: 1800 951 822 | Website: agedcarequality.gov.au
